source.sqlReaderQuery:
-- ? Extended Cashflow Forecast with Job, Milestone, Aging, and Rolling Balances

-- 1. Branch-Division Mapping
WITH Division_Mapping AS (
     SELECT '00' AS BranchPrefix, 2 AS PrefixLength, 'Renuity LLC' AS Division UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Re', 2, 'Renuity LLC' UNION ALL
	SELECT '01', 2, 'Home Org' UNION ALL
    SELECT '03', 2, 'Home Org' UNION ALL
    SELECT '1',  1, 'Rite Window' UNION ALL
    SELECT '2',  1, 'FHIA' UNION ALL
    SELECT '3',  1, 'Statewide' UNION ALL
    SELECT '4',  1, 'Mad City' UNION ALL
    SELECT '5',  1, 'Home Org' UNION ALL
    SELECT '6',  1, 'Rite Window' UNION ALL
    SELECT '7',  1, 'Max Home' UNION ALL
    SELECT '8',  1, 'Pacific Bath' UNION ALL
    SELECT '9',  1, 'Bylte'
),

-- 2. AR Summary
AR_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(p.PaymentDate AS DATE) AS SnapshotDate,
        --inv.Branch AS Branch,
        dm.Division,
        SUM(adj.AdjAmount) AS TotalCustomerReceipts
    FROM ODS.ERP_AR_INVOICE inv
    JOIN ODS.ERP_AR_ADJUST adj ON inv.ReferenceNbr = adj.Invoice_Tran_ReferenceNbr AND inv.Type = adj.Invoice_Tran_type
    JOIN ODS.ERP_AR_PAYMENT p ON adj.Payment_SOAdjust_ReferenceNbr = p.ReferenceNbr AND adj.Payment_SOAdjust_type = p.Type
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm 
        ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(inv.Branch, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(inv.Branch, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    WHERE CAST(p.PaymentDate as DATE) >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and CAST(p.PaymentDate as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
      --AND dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY CAST(p.PaymentDate AS DATE), --inv.Branch, 
	dm.Division
),

-- 3. AP Summary
AP_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(p.PaymentDate AS DATE) AS SnapshotDate,
        --p.Branch AS Branch,
        dm.Division,
        SUM(bpl.CurrentAdjustAmt) AS TotalVendorPayments
    FROM ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i
    JOIN ODS.ERP_BILLS_PAYMENTS_LINK bpl ON i.ReferenceNbr = bpl.InvoiceRefNbr
    JOIN ODS.ERP_AP_PAYMENT p ON bpl.PaymentRefNbr = p.ReferenceNbr
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm 
        ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(p.Branch, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(p.Branch, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    WHERE CAST(p.PaymentDate as DATE) >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and CAST(p.PaymentDate as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
      --AND dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY CAST(p.PaymentDate AS DATE), --p.Branch, 
	dm.Division
),

-- 4. GL Summary
GL_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(g.TransactionDate AS DATE) AS SnapshotDate,
        --g.BranchCode AS Branch,
        dm.Division,
        SUM(g.DebitAmount) AS TotalDebit,
        SUM(g.CreditAmount) AS TotalCredit
    FROM EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a ON g.AccountCode = a.AccountCode
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm 
        ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(g.BranchCode, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(g.BranchCode, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    WHERE CAST(g.TransactionDate as DATE) >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and CAST(g.TransactionDate as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
      --AND dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY CAST(g.TransactionDate AS DATE), --g.BranchCode, 
	dm.Division
),

-- 5. Payroll Summary
Payroll_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        PayDate AS SnapshotDate,
        CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN 'Home Org'
		WHEN Division='MXH' THEN 'Max Home'
		WHEN Division='MAC' THEN 'Mad City'
		WHEN Division='PBC' THEN 'Pacific Bath'
		WHEN Division IN ('RTW','HSI') THEN 'Rite Window'
		WHEN Division='SWR' THEN 'Statewide'
		WHEN Division='REN' THEN 'Renuity LLC'
		WHEN Division='FHI' THEN 'FHIA' END as Division,
        SUM(GrossPay) AS TotalGrossPay,
        SUM(TotalEarnings) AS TotalEarnings
    FROM EDW.FACT_HR_EMPLOYEE_WAGES
    WHERE CAST(PayDate as DATE) >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and CAST(PayDate as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
      --AND Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY PayDate, CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN 'Home Org'
		WHEN Division='MXH' THEN 'Max Home'
		WHEN Division='MAC' THEN 'Mad City'
		WHEN Division='PBC' THEN 'Pacific Bath'
		WHEN Division IN ('RTW','HSI') THEN 'Rite Window'
		WHEN Division='SWR' THEN 'Statewide'
		WHEN Division='REN' THEN 'Renuity LLC'
		WHEN Division='FHI' THEN 'FHIA' END 
),

-- 6. AR Aging Summary
AR_Aging_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        AgedOnDate AS SnapshotDate,
        --LEFT(ar.BranchName,4) AS Branch,
        dm.Division,
        SUM(Balance) AS AR_TotalBalance
    FROM EDW.FACT_AR_AGED_PERIOD_DETAIL ar
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm 
        ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(ar.BranchName, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(ar.BranchName, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    --WHERE dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY AgedOnDate, --LEFT(ar.BranchName,4), 
	dm.Division
),

-- 7. AP Aging Summary
AP_Aging_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        AgedOnDate AS SnapshotDate,
        --a.BranchCode AS Branch,
        dm.Division,
        SUM(Balance) AS AP_TotalBalance
    FROM EDW.FACT_AP_AGED_PERIOD a
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm 
        ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(a.BranchCode, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(a.BranchCode, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    --WHERE dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY AgedOnDate, --a.BranchCode, 
	dm.Division
),

-- 8. Job Info and Milestones
Job_Milestone_Summary AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE) AS SnapshotDate,
        --B.ACU_ID AS Branch,
        CASE WHEN J.Division='CTA' THEN 'Home Org'
		WHEN J.Division='MXH' THEN 'Max Home'
		WHEN J.Division='MAC' THEN 'Mad City'
		WHEN J.Division='PBC' THEN 'Pacific Bath'
		WHEN J.Division='RTW' THEN 'Rite Window'
		WHEN J.Division='SWR' THEN 'Statewide'
		WHEN J.Division='FHI' THEN 'FHIA' END as Division,
        COUNT(DISTINCT J.JobID) AS TotalJobs,
        SUM(ISNULL(J.GrossAmount, 0)) AS TotalGrossAmount
        --MIN(m.ActualDate) AS FirstStartDate,
        --MAX(m2.ActualDate) AS LastCompletionDate
    FROM EDW.FACT_JOB J
    LEFT JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN B ON B.BranchID = J.ProductionBranchID
    LEFT JOIN Division_Mapping dm ON (dm.PrefixLength = 2 AND LEFT(B.ACU_ID, 2) = dm.BranchPrefix)
        OR (dm.PrefixLength = 1 AND LEFT(B.BranchID, 1) = dm.BranchPrefix)
    --LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL m ON m.JobID = J.JobID AND m.MilestoneDateTypeID LIKE '%-S'
    --LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL m2 ON m2.JobID = J.JobID AND m2.MilestoneDateTypeID LIKE '%-C'
    WHERE CAST(J.ContractDate as DATE) >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and CAST(J.ContractDate as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
      --AND dm.Division = 'FHI'
    GROUP BY CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE), --B.ACU_ID, 
	CASE WHEN J.Division='CTA' THEN 'Home Org'
		WHEN J.Division='MXH' THEN 'Max Home'
		WHEN J.Division='MAC' THEN 'Mad City'
		WHEN J.Division='PBC' THEN 'Pacific Bath'
		WHEN J.Division='RTW' THEN 'Rite Window'
		WHEN J.Division='SWR' THEN 'Statewide'
		WHEN J.Division='FHI' THEN 'FHIA' END
),

-- 9. Final Output
Final_Data AS (
SELECT
    COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate, gl.SnapshotDate, pr.SnapshotDate, ara.SnapshotDate, apa.SnapshotDate, jm.SnapshotDate) AS SnapshotDate,
    --COALESCE(ar.Branch, ap.Branch, gl.Branch, ara.Branch, apa.Branch, jm.Branch) AS Branch,
    COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division, gl.Division, pr.Division, ara.Division, apa.Division, jm.Division) AS Division,

    -- Cashflow Metrics
    ISNULL(ar.TotalCustomerReceipts, 0) AS TotalCustomerReceipts,
    ISNULL(ap.TotalVendorPayments, 0) AS TotalVendorPayments,
    ISNULL(gl.TotalDebit, 0) AS TotalDebitGL,
    ISNULL(gl.TotalCredit, 0) AS TotalCreditGL,
    ISNULL(pr.TotalGrossPay, 0) AS GrossPayroll,
    ISNULL(pr.TotalEarnings, 0) AS TotalPayrollEarnings,

    -- Aging Balances
    ISNULL(ara.AR_TotalBalance, 0) AS AR_Balance,
    ISNULL(apa.AP_TotalBalance, 0) AS AP_Balance,

    -- Projection
    ISNULL(ar.TotalCustomerReceipts, 0)
    - ISNULL(ap.TotalVendorPayments, 0)
    - ISNULL(pr.TotalGrossPay, 0) AS ProjectedNetCashflow,

    -- Job & Milestone
    ISNULL(jm.TotalJobs, 0) AS TotalJobs,
    ISNULL(jm.TotalGrossAmount, 0) AS TotalJobGrossAmount
    --jm.FirstStartDate,
    --jm.LastCompletionDate
FROM AR_Summary ar
FULL OUTER JOIN AP_Summary ap ON ar.SnapshotDate = ap.SnapshotDate AND ar.Division = ap.Division --AND ar.Branch = ap.Branch
FULL OUTER JOIN GL_Summary gl ON COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate) = gl.SnapshotDate AND COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division) = gl.Division --AND COALESCE(ar.Branch, ap.Branch) = gl.Branch
FULL OUTER JOIN Payroll_Summary pr ON COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate, gl.SnapshotDate) = pr.SnapshotDate AND COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division, gl.Division) = pr.Division
FULL OUTER JOIN AR_Aging_Summary ara ON COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate, gl.SnapshotDate, pr.SnapshotDate) = ara.SnapshotDate AND COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division, gl.Division,pr.Division)=ara.Division--AND COALESCE(ar.Branch, ap.Branch, gl.Branch) = ara.Branch
FULL OUTER JOIN AP_Aging_Summary apa ON COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate, gl.SnapshotDate, pr.SnapshotDate,ara.SnapshotDate) = apa.SnapshotDate AND COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division, gl.Division,pr.Division,ara.Division)=apa.Division--AND COALESCE(ar.Branch, ap.Branch, gl.Branch) = apa.Branch
FULL OUTER JOIN Job_Milestone_Summary jm ON COALESCE(ar.SnapshotDate, ap.SnapshotDate, gl.SnapshotDate, pr.SnapshotDate,ara.SnapshotDate,apa.SnapshotDate) = jm.SnapshotDate AND COALESCE(ar.Division, ap.Division, gl.Division,pr.Division,ara.Division,apa.Division)=jm.Division--AND COALESCE(ar.Branch, ap.Branch, gl.Branch) = jm.Branch
)

-- 10. Add Rolling Cashflow
SELECT *,
    SUM(ProjectedNetCashflow) OVER (PARTITION BY Division ORDER BY SnapshotDate ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CumulativeCashFlow
FROM Final_Data
ORDER BY SnapshotDate, Division;
